reviews.review_description: I have the demo and I thought there would be more levels in the full one so I get it and it’s LITERALLY THE SAME AS THE DEMO

reviews.review_title: DO NOT buy this game it sucks
reviews.review_description: If you buy this game you're going to get scammed so do not buy it it is a big scam the movement sucks and other stuff then don't waste $9 on this stupid game on this stupid game bye-bye
Don’t get it it’s no different then the demo it’s totally waste of money

If you want to play this game DO NOT get the payed version it is the exact same thing as the free demo. The only thing different is that there’s a leaderboard and that is it otherwise it has the same amount of content as the full game. There is only one level. This game has a lot of potential, but the developers need to take more time to make more levels.

I love this game, I've played it for ~1 week and my pb is 16:58. My one issue is the lack of new content, 6 months ago the developers said there'd be new content soon, and it still hasn't gotten here.

There is literally just one level in the entire game which will take an hour to complete TOPS and 4 MONTHS AGO someone said the same thing I’m saying and the developers said that more content will be added “soon” if you want to play this game just get the demo because the demo has the exact same amount of content as the full game. The only difference between this and the demo is the leaderboard so fun game but lack of content.

Wasn't sold on this at first, but over time I saw the beauty of speed-running this, you get faster, fitter and better each time you play, your mechanics get smoother, you discover more optimal routes, I started at rank 200 or something and now I'm rank 8 and I just found some SUPER OPTIMAL routes that I never even tried before! Amazing level design, I play this easily for 1-2hrs at a time and I've never gotten so sweaty without wanting to slow down before, this is a real GEM..

2 things I would LOVE to see added:

#1 - A button combo to restart, so if I mess something up I can just hit a combo you'd never accidentally hit so get straight back into it and try again!

#2 - GHOSTING(?) - not sure what the real term is but when you see your past run, or your BEST RUN, it helps hugely plus sometimes I forget which route I even took, also it would be fantastic to hit a button and just leave a marker where you're standing that simply says the time you were there.. personal checkpoints, I try to get to the first DASH sign within 28 seconds or I'll restart my run, so that would be a perfect example of placing a personal checkpoint, when I get the lego bit I always forget what time is my best.. stuff like that!
This game is great and an oy up vr game is genius. But it would draw more attention and be more fun with multiplayer. Definitely should add it!!

developer_response.body: Hello tgbcumquad! Thank you for the review and 5 stars!! The team is working on the game update, so more fun is incoming soon! :)

reviews.review_description: Bruh I finished this game in 2 days and I’m trying to refund it so I could get money for night club simulator
It says multiple levels. There is 1 chapter we that takes 20-30 mins then your done. I want more content.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for the review! We are already working on new levels! The update will come soon!

reviews.review_title: Good game for first Time vr
reviews.review_description: Its a good game , its only up but in vr and with dash ability. But the game is only one chapter and i finish in 40 minutes for a 8/9€ game its not worth it well i know there will be more level soon but there is another thing i dont like its that there is no context / no History we just Spawn like that on a platform and maybe a Speedrun mode without checkpoint with a great music would be good (just m'y Idea). Well this is a good game for first vr game for New player in vr

developer_response.body: Hey there, Jemelatunz! Thank you for the review! We are already working on the update for the game! New levels will be available soon! Also, thank you for the suggestion, we appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, unfortunately the pause screen has a restart button that one would assume would take you back to the last checkpoint but actually erases all data and starts you from the beginning with no way to go back to the checkpoint. Lost over 6hrs of work :(
I love this game I’m trying to be top 15 my personal record is 20minutes and 46 seconds

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for the 5 stars! We glad to hear you liked the game! Your record is amazing! The update is coming soon!
